strings.panel.p1.bubble.center.html: Okay, so the player's making me do all sorts of dangerous stuff.
strings.panel.p2.bubble.center.html: But man, it'll be worth it when I rescue my girlfriend, Sheena.
strings.panel.p3.bubble.center.html: Heh heh, I'll bet she'll be super grateful. Muchas smoochas, here I come!
strings.panel.p4.bubble.center.html: Hm, I wonder what she looks like?...
